settings.cards.clozeBgColor.desc: Background color for revealed cloze pills. Leave empty to use the theme accent. Standard mode only.
settings.cards.clozeBgColor.name: Cloze background color
settings.cards.clozeBgColor.reset: Cloze background color reset to default
settings.cards.clozeTextColor.desc: Text color for revealed cloze pills. Leave empty for automatic contrast. Standard mode only.
settings.cards.clozeTextColor.name: Cloze text color
settings.cards.clozeTextColor.reset: Cloze text color reset to default
ui.settings.cards.imageOcclusion.otherMa: Background color for context masks. Leave empty to use the theme foreground color.
ui.settings.cards.imageOcclusion.targetM: Background color for the active mask. Leave empty to use the theme accent.
ui.settings.reading.colours.desc.markdow: Background color for revealed cloze spans in dark theme.
Background color for revealed cloze spans in light theme.
Text color for revealed cloze spans in dark theme.
Text color for revealed cloze spans in light theme.
ui.settings.reading.colours.desc.sourceB: Source background color. Dark mode is generated from this.
ui.settings.reading.colours.desc.sourceC: Source cloze text color. Dark mode is generated from this.
ui.settings.reading.colours.desc.sourceT: Source text color. Dark mode is generated from this.
ui.settings.reading.colours.flashcardsDe: Customize Flashcards colors for Reading view.
ui.settings.reading.colours.markdownDesc: Customize Clean markdown cloze colors for light and dark themes.
ui.settings.reading.colours.unsupportedD: Switch to Flashcards or Clean markdown to customize colors.
Auto-generate dark colors from light colors.
